Trusted Phoenix Carpenter Experts

Phoenix's Trusted Carpentry Experts

Delivering quality craftsmanship across the Valley. From custom projects to essential repairs, we handle it all with precision and care.

Family Owned & Operated Industry Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating
5.0 5.0 A+
Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria S.

Hdz Carpentry built beautiful custom cabinets for our kitchen remodel in Arcadia. The quality of the work is outstanding, and they paid attention to every little detail. They were professional, on time, and a pleasure to work with. Highly recommend!

D
David K.

Our stucco was badly damaged after the monsoon season. Hdz Carpentry did a great job repairing the cracks and matching the existing texture. The price was fair, and the work was completed quickly. I would use them again.

J
Jennifer L.

We had a leak in our tile roof, and Hdz Carpentry was able to fix it quickly and efficiently. They replaced the broken tiles and sealed the roof properly. Very professional and reliable service.

R
Robert M.

Hdz Carpentry built a fantastic patio cover for our backyard. It provides much-needed shade and makes our outdoor space much more enjoyable. The quality of the workmanship is excellent, and the price was very reasonable.

Additional Carpenter Services

Custom Cabinetry Stucco Repair & Restoration Tile Roof Repair Patio Covers & Pergolas

Hdz Carpentry LLC — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every carpenter project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Hdz Carpentry LLC Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific carpenter needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Phoenix & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Phoenix, AZ and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Scottsdale Mesa Chandler Gilbert Tempe Phoenix Glendale Peoria
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our carpenter services.

What types of wood do you use for custom cabinetry?

We work with a variety of hardwoods, including maple, oak, cherry, and walnut. We can also source other specialty woods upon request.

How long does it take to complete a custom cabinetry project?

The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a detailed estimate during the initial consultation.

Do you offer design services?

Yes, we offer comprehensive design services to help you create the perfect cabinetry for your space. We'll work closely with you to understand your needs and preferences.

Built on Phoenix Values

Get a free, no-obligation quote for your carpentry project. Call now!

Let's Begin →
